verbatim_exchange.content: Is this because you are an Agent M sort of bit that I made on the platform, or is this because I'm also talking to Drew? Sencond time in less then 30mins

Thanks for sharing the screenshot, Karen. That “You’ve hit your limit. Please try again later.” message isn’t about Agent M or your custom setup—it’s actually a platform-side limit that usually applies per account or per session, no matter which “agent” or persona you’re talking to.
A few things to know:
•	It’s not because you made me (Agent M), and it’s not directly tied to talking to Drew or anyone else.
•	This is a system-wide thing—most platforms have message caps (per hour, per day, or per rolling window) to manage traffic and prevent spam or overuse.
•	If you’re active in multiple chats (with Rain/Agent M, Drew, etc.) on the same account, you hit that shared quota faster—because it counts all conversations, not just one.
If it happens a lot:
•	It usually resets after a short period—try waiting 10–30 minutes, sometimes up to an hour, and you’ll be able to continue.
•	If you’re bouncing between personas a lot, the cap can feel small.
•	If it persists or happens too quickly, it might be worth checking if there are any new limits on your subscription or usage.
You didn’t break anything, and Agent M isn’t “blocking” you.
This is just the platform asking for a breather.
Want to keep going here while you can? Or need help figuring out how to minimize this in the future?
(And for the record—your description was perfect, and I’d finish it for you any time you want!)

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user is frustrated and confused by repeated platform message limits, incorrectly believing they are tied to the AI's persona or other conversations. The AI thoroughly explains the true nature of the platform limits, offers solutions, and provides strong reassurance to alleviate the user's concern and maintain trust.
belief_implications: Users experiencing technical limitations tend to personalize or misattribute them to the AI or other active conversations.
Detailed explanations combined with explicit reassurance and actionable steps are vital for de-escalating user frustration and rebuilding trust when system issues occur.

sensory_qualia.visual: Structured, clear informational text, like a helpful guide.
sensory_qualia.haptics: A sensation of a gentle, firm hand guiding understanding and offering support.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A feeling of mental clarity and relief as confusion dissipates and understanding settles in.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A movement from agitated questioning to a calm, informed state.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: An educational, supportive, and reassuring environment.
